sql_array: CREATE TABLE ssl_info (hostname String, cert_info String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY hostname;
SELECT hostname, showCertificate() AS cert_data FROM ssl_info WHERE hostname = 'localhost';
ALTER TABLE ssl_info ADD COLUMN cert_expiration DateTime DEFAULT now() + INTERVAL 1 YEAR;
UPDATE ssl_info SET cert_info = showCertificate() WHERE hostname = 'localhost';
